message:
feat(gui): agent-aware session management with state detection and mass operations (ft-1memj.17)

Adds agent pane state detection (Active/Thinking/Stuck/Idle/Human) with
configurable timing thresholds, color-coded pane borders, mass agent
operations (KillStuckAgents, PauseAllAgents, FocusErrorPanes), backpressure
visualization types, and auto-layout policy support.

New files:
- agent_pane_state.rs: AgentPaneState enum, AgentDetectionConfig,
  PaneActivityTimestamps with classify() logic, PaneBackpressureOverlay,
  AutoLayoutPolicy, and 8 unit tests

Config surface:
- 9 new TOML keys under [agent_detection] with sensible defaults
- Test coverage for TOML parsing

GUI integration:
- 4 new KeyAssignment variants with Cmd+Shift+K/O/E shortcuts
- TermWindow tracks per-pane agent states in HashMap
- Pane renderer draws colored border overlay based on agent state
- Command definitions registered in commands.rs DEFS list

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # Copy to ~/.config/frankenterm/frankenterm.toml to customize.
 #
 # Docs: all keys map to WezTerm config, with TOML syntax.
-# Migration: frankenterm setup migrate-config (converts wezterm.lua)
+# Migration: see docs/extensions/migration-guide.md (wezterm.lua -> frankenterm.toml)
 
 # --- Appearance ---
 
@@ -107,6 +107,35 @@ resize_wrap_readability_max_fallback_ratio_percent = 20
 # resize_wrap_kp_lookahead_limit = 64
 # resize_wrap_kp_max_dp_states = 8192
 
+# --- Agent Detection ---
+
+# Agent pane state detection: color-coded borders for AI agent panes.
+# States: Active (green), Thinking (yellow), Stuck (red), Idle (gray).
+agent_detection_enabled = true
+
+# Timing thresholds (milliseconds) for state classification:
+# agent_active_threshold_ms = 5000    # Output within this → Active
+# agent_thinking_threshold_ms = 5000  # Input sent, no output yet → Thinking
+# agent_stuck_threshold_ms = 30000    # No output after input for this long → Stuck
+# agent_idle_threshold_ms = 60000     # No I/O for this long → Idle
+
+# Show agent name and provider overlay in pane title bar.
+agent_show_name_overlay = true
+
+# Show backpressure tier (Green/Yellow/Red/Black) in pane chrome.
+agent_show_backpressure = true
+
+# Border width (pixels) for agent state indicator.
+# agent_border_width = 2
+
+# Auto-layout policy for agent panes: by_status, by_activity, by_domain, manual.
+# agent_auto_layout = "by_status"
+
+# Mass operations:
+#   Cmd+Shift+K  Kill all stuck agents
+#   Cmd+Shift+O  Pause all agent input
+#   Cmd+Shift+E  Focus next error/stuck pane
+
 # --- SSH Domains ---
 
 # SSH domains are auto-discovered from ~/.ssh/config by default.

@@ -636,6 +636,20 @@ pub enum KeyAssignment {
 
     CopyMode(CopyModeAssignment),
     RotatePanes(RotationDirection),
+    SwapLayoutNext,
+    SwapLayoutPrev,
+    SwapToLayoutIndex(usize),
+    ToggleFloatingPane,
+    CycleStackForward,
+    CycleStackBackward,
+    /// Kill all agent panes detected as Stuck (Cmd+Shift+K).
+    KillStuckAgents,
+    /// Pause input to all agent panes (Cmd+Shift+P).
+    PauseAllAgents,
+    /// Filter view to only show panes with detected errors (Cmd+Shift+E).
+    FocusErrorPanes,
+    /// Cycle agent auto-layout policy (by_status → by_activity → by_domain → manual).
+    CycleAgentAutoLayout,
     SplitPane(SplitPane),
     PaneSelect(PaneSelectArguments),
     CharSelect(CharSelectArguments),
